backend.cloudflare.build: cd ../.. && pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=backend-cloudflare

workflow.cloudflareWorker.build: cd ../.. && pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=workflow-cloudflare-worker-example

app.client.build: cd ../.. && pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=client
app.client.deploy: cd ../.. && hylo_vercel() { if [ -n "$VERCEL_TOKEN" ]; then pnpm exec vercel "$@" --token "$VERCEL_TOKEN"; else pnpm exec vercel "$@"; fi; }; hylo_vercel link --yes --scope team_Idk3ytPuEMlKkO2tZpUZZ4Ac --project hylo-client && hylo_vercel deploy --prod --yes --force --build-env VITE_HYLO_WORKFLOW="$VITE_HYLO_WORKFLOW" --build-env VITE_HYLO_WORKFLOW_URL="$VITE_HYLO_WORKFLOW_URL" --build-env VITE_HYLO_WORKFLOWS="$VITE_HYLO_WORKFLOWS"
